_comment: Sector-turnaround overlay for turnaround.py. THIS IS YOUR EDITABLE MACRO ASSUMPTION about which sectors are turning around on domestic + global factors. A company is tagged (and gets a small score bonus + a note in the report) when its screener industry matches a key below, case-insensitively, as a substring. Review and edit periodically — these views go stale. Set turnaround_sectors to {} to disable the overlay.

turnaround_sectors.Chemicals: Domestic: destocking cycle ending, capex restarting. Global: specialty/agrochem demand recovering off cyclical lows.
turnaround_sectors.Textiles: Domestic: PLI support, stable cotton prices. Global: US/EU retail restocking and China+1 sourcing shift.
turnaround_sectors.Metals: Domestic: infra and capex-led demand. Global: supply discipline plus China stimulus supporting prices.
turnaround_sectors.Auto Ancillaries: Domestic: CV/PV upcycle. Global: rising export content per vehicle and EV component demand.
turnaround_sectors.Capital Goods: Domestic: private capex revival, defence and railways ordering. Global: supply-chain diversification (China+1).
turnaround_sectors.Information Technology: Domestic: deal pipeline stabilising. Global: discretionary IT spend bottoming, AI-led deal flow.
